title: Taiwan's Intelligence Recruitment Faces a Domestic Security Dilemma
summary: Taiwan's new online intelligence portal invites mainland Chinese citizens to spy for Taipei — but without refugee law or asylum protections, it exposes informants to prosecution and leaves 260,000 mainland spouses caught in a domestic security paradox.

title: Semantic Understanding of Code Structure for Context-Aware Coding Agents
summary: Investigates how combining AST-based retrieval, hybrid vector search, and a DAP-backed Debugger MCP enables AI coding agents to reason over real software architecture rather than isolated code snippets.

title: Probabilistic Forecasting for Product Metrics
summary: When to prefer quantile loss over MSE and a simple baseline you can ship.

title: Runoff vs. Plurality: Strategic Voting Effects
summary: How institutional rules shape voter incentives and candidate positioning.

title: The Development of Uyghur Ethnic Nationalism and the Chinese State's Response: A Policy Analysis
summary: Traces the iterative failure of Beijing's Xinjiang policies — from economic inducement to securitized repression — and how each transition deepened the cycle of ethnic grievance and nationalist mobilization among Uyghurs.

title: Jensen Huang Joined Trump's China Visit — Not Nvidia's 'Wish'
summary: Jensen Huang's last-minute addition to Trump's China delegation was not Nvidia's own doing — he was a pawn in the Trump–Xi bilateral bargain, and the AI chip deadlock never became the main course of the summit.

title: Taiwan's Defence Deadlock is Weakening Deterrence
summary: Taiwan's legislature passed a heavily reduced NT$780 billion defence budget, replacing long-term strategic investment with fragmented parliamentary oversight — a deterrence deficit Beijing is well positioned to exploit.

title: The Problem With Betting Taiwan's Future on an Unreliable Washington
summary: Taiwan's dependence on U.S. military support has become a strategic vulnerability as Washington's commitment grows increasingly transactional. The case for diversifying security partnerships across the Indo-Pacific.

title: Takaichi Sanae’s Push for Technological Sovereignty is Reshaping Cross-Strait Power
summary: An analysis of how Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi’s shift toward crisis-management investment and technological sovereignty is redefining Japan’s regional strategy and altering the structural balance across the Taiwan Strait.

title: “Rational Loathing”: The Policy Implications of Affective Polarization in Taiwan
summary: Finds that partisan hostility in Taiwan is grounded in cross-Strait and transitional-justice policy divides, not pure identity animus.

title: Social Media and Economic Voting: Revisiting Media Effects in the Digital Era
summary: Explores how social-media usage both informs and biases economic voting in the U.S. context.
